description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 17 (Tuesday), we received a donation from the Reiwa 7 Hanno City 60th Birthday Celebration Committee (令和7年度飯能市60歳の集い実行委員会).

We will use this donation to further advance child-related policies, including continuous childcare support for children who will shape our future.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13215.html
summary: 📝 Mayor receives donation from Hanno City 60th Birthday Celebration Committee (Reiwa 7)
